canonical_question: How does economic nexus work for US SaaS sales tax?
aliases: Do I need to collect sales tax on SaaS in every state?
Which states require SaaS companies to collect sales tax?
What are the economic nexus thresholds for SaaS businesses?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Maryland enacted 3% tech services tax on SaaS effective July 1, 2025; Illinois removed 200-transaction threshold effective January 1, 2026

constraints: US jurisdiction only — does not cover VAT/GST on SaaS in EU, UK, Canada, or other countries
State laws change frequently — 2025-2026 saw Maryland add SaaS taxation and Illinois remove transaction thresholds; always verify current state rules
Only ~25 states tax SaaS as of 2026 — SaaS is not universally taxable across all 45 sales-tax states
Economic nexus thresholds vary by state ($100K is most common, but CA/NY/TX use $500K); some states still include 200-transaction tests
Marketplace facilitator laws may shift collection responsibility from the SaaS seller to the platform in some states

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User sells physical products, not SaaS or digital services
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: General US sales tax nexus guidance for physical goods

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs EU/UK VAT on digital services, not US sales tax
User only sells SaaS within a single state where they are already registered
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: State-specific sales tax filing guidance for that state

related_to.label: CCPA/CPRA Privacy Compliance (another state-by-state US compliance burden for SaaS)

often_confused_with.label: US Income Tax Nexus (different thresholds, different obligations)

inputs_needed.question: What is your annual US SaaS revenue (across all states)?
In how many US states do you have customers?
Do you have employees, offices, or inventory in any US states beyond your home state?
How do you sell your SaaS product?
options: Through a marketplace or reseller platform

applies_to.user_segment: SaaS companies selling to US customers across state lines
applies_to.context: Post-Wayfair economic nexus obligations for remote sellers of cloud-based software
